critical.mandate: Execute phases sequentially — each phase builds on the previous output
Synthesize all three agent contributions into a unified creative brief

step.title: Sprint Briefing
step.action: Define the creative challenge in a clear problem statement
Identify constraints: budget, timeline, technology, brand guidelines
Define success criteria: what does a good outcome look like?
Identify target audience and key stakeholders

step.title: Empathize Phase
step.action: Invoke design-thinking workflow (Lyra) in focused mode
Focus on empathize and define phases: user research, personas, journey maps
Capture key insights: user needs, pain points, opportunities
Output: empathy map and problem definition document

step.title: Solve Phase
step.action: Invoke problem-solving workflow (Nova) using design thinking outputs as input
Apply systematic problem-solving methodologies to the defined problem
Generate multiple solution approaches with trade-off analysis
Output: ranked solution proposals with feasibility assessment

step.title: Innovate Phase
step.action: Invoke innovation-strategy workflow (Orion) building on the solutions
Identify disruption opportunities and business model innovations
Assess strategic fit and competitive differentiation
Output: innovation roadmap with prioritized initiatives

step.title: Synthesize
step.action: Combine insights from empathize, solve, and innovate phases
Create unified creative brief with: problem, user insights, solutions, innovations
Map solutions to user needs identified in empathy phase
Define next steps and implementation priorities

step.title: Generate Output
step.action: Generate unified creative brief synthesizing empathy, solutions, and innovations
